team.name: Mir Faizan
team.title: Founder & Chief Executive Officer
team.bio:
Mir Faizan is the Founder and CEO of Horizon Physician Services LLC, a trusted healthcare solutions company specializing in Workers’ Compensation Management, Medical Billing, Medical Coding, Provider Credentialing, and Revenue Cycle Management. With a strong commitment to excellence, compliance, and operational efficiency, he helps healthcare providers optimize revenue, streamline processes, and achieve sustainable growth.

In addition to his leadership in healthcare services, Mir is the Founder and CEO of Storm Communications, a successful Business Process Outsourcing (BPO) company that has been delivering exceptional business solutions and client support services for over six years. His diverse experience across healthcare and business operations has enabled him to build high-performing teams, foster long-term partnerships, and drive measurable results.

Mission

To empower healthcare providers and businesses with innovative, reliable, and results-driven solutions that enhance performance, maximize growth, and create lasting value through excellence, integrity, and exceptional service.

team.name: Eman Fatima
team.title: Chief Financial Officer
team.bio:
Chief Financial Officer (CFO)

With a strong foundation in healthcare operations, revenue cycle management, and financial strategy, brings extensive experience across Medical Billing, Workers' Compensation, Personal Injury Case Management, Healthcare Compliance, and Business Operations.

Holding a Bachelor's degree in Psychology, along with certifications in Professional Medical Billing (CPB) and HIPAA Compliance. Demonstrates a comprehensive understanding of healthcare financial processes, claims management, reimbursement optimization, provider relations, and operational performance.

Previously served as a Negotiation Officer managing Workers' Compensation and Personal Injury cases, working closely with healthcare providers, insurance carriers, attorneys, and case managers to facilitate successful claim resolutions and maximize financial outcomes.

Committed to driving organizational growth, operational excellence, regulatory compliance, and sustainable financial performance while delivering exceptional value to healthcare providers and their patients.
